title: AuthorRanking Collection
description: Array of AuthorRanking records. Each element: Author ranking entry combining artifact contributions, citation impact, and AE committee service.

AuthorRanking.description: Author ranking entry combining artifact contributions, citation impact, and AE committee service.

rank.description: Ranking position (with ties). Minimum combined_score of 3 to appear.
rank.title: Rank

author_id.description: Stable integer ID referencing the canonical author_index. Null for authors not yet indexed.
author_id.title: Author Id

name.description: Full author name including DBLP disambiguation suffix, e.g. 'Jing Liu 0074'.
name.title: Name

display_name.description: Human-readable name without DBLP disambiguation suffix, e.g. 'Jing Liu'.
display_name.title: Display Name

affiliation.description: Raw affiliation string as returned from DBLP, e.g. 'EPFL, Lausanne, Switzerland'.
affiliation.title: Affiliation

display_affiliation.description: Normalized institution name, e.g. 'EPFL', 'University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign'.
display_affiliation.title: Display Affiliation

artifact_count.description: Total number of artifacts authored across all tracked conferences.
artifact_count.title: Artifact Count

artifact_score.description: Points from artifacts. Scoring: 1 pt (available) + 1 pt (functional) + 1 pt (reproduced) per artifact.
artifact_score.title: Artifact Score

artifact_citations.description: Sum of artifact citation counts. Currently 0 for all authors (tracking in progress).
artifact_citations.title: Artifact Citations

citation_score.description: Points from artifact citations. Currently 0 for all authors (tracking in progress).
citation_score.title: Citation Score

total_papers.description: Total papers published at tracked conferences, sourced from DBLP.
total_papers.title: Total Papers

artifact_pct.description: Percentage of papers with artifacts: (artifact_count / total_papers) * 100.
artifact_pct.title: Artifact Pct

repro_pct.description: Percentage of artifacts with a 'reproduced' badge: (reproduced / artifact_count) * 100.
repro_pct.title: Repro Pct

ae_memberships.description: Total number of AE committee memberships across all conferences and years.
ae_memberships.title: Ae Memberships

chair_count.description: Number of times served as AE chair.
chair_count.title: Chair Count

ae_ratio.description: Artifact-to-AE score ratio (artifact_score / ae_score). Null if ae_score is 0.
ae_ratio.title: Ae Ratio

combined_score.description: Total score: artifact_score + citation_score + ae_score. Only authors with ≥3 appear.
combined_score.title: Combined Score

badges_available.description: Total number of 'available' badges across this author's artifacts.
badges_available.title: Badges Available

badges_functional.description: Total number of 'functional' badges across this author's artifacts.
badges_functional.title: Badges Functional

badges_reproducible.description: Total number of 'reproduced' badges across this author's artifacts.
badges_reproducible.title: Badges Reproducible

conferences.description: Distinct conference abbreviations where author contributed, e.g. ['ATC', 'OSDI', 'USENIXSEC'].
conferences.title: Conferences

years.description: Year (as string) → activity count for that year, e.g. {'2023': 5, '2024': 7}.
years.title: Years

first_year.description: Earliest year of activity, e.g. 2020. Null if unknown.
first_year.title: First Year

last_year.description: Most recent year of activity, e.g. 2026. Null if unknown.
last_year.title: Last Year

AuthorRanking.title: AuthorRanking
